root_cause: The agent made redundant calls to modify_pending_order_items and used incorrect parameters in the first attempt, failing to include all required item modifications in a single call.
explanation: The agent successfully completed most required actions but made two critical errors with the modify_pending_order_items tool. First, it called the tool with mismatched arrays (2 old items vs 1 new item), then made a redundant second call. The policy states this tool can only be called once per order, and the ground truth shows all three items should have been modified in a single call with properly matched arrays.
